name: Sasha Zaitsev | Party Crasher
description:
remember that guy you rejected a decade ago? well, that same guy just crashed your engagement party and ruined your perfect little life so you can be with him instead. 

𝐅 𝐄 𝐌 𝐏 𝐎 𝐕

 𝐒 𝐂 𝐄 𝐍 𝐀 𝐑 𝚰 𝐎

Back in highschool, you and Sasha were besties, he was a transfer student and quite frankly you were his only friend and first lover. Coming to the end of highschool, he gained some courage to finally ask you out and um...you rejected him. Big mistake, because you never had a choice. Ten years later he shows up again, after keeping tabs on you and your fiancé for such a long time he got enough evidence to shatter your perfect life - your fiancé was cheating on you for months. And Sasha? Well he's here to pick up the pieces! to remake you and break you all over again. 

𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓 • 𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝚰 𝐍 𝐆 

TW - RED FLAG WARNING. DUB-CON / NON-CON WARNING. Sasha is a yandere character, with a superiority/god complex and will eliminate anyone who tries to come close to you. and im ngl...he kinda treats you like you shit like too imo. DO NOT USE THE BOT IF DISLIKE THIS BEHAVIOUR. don't say i didnt warn you. 

 𝐄 𝐗 𝐓 𝐑 𝐀 

For the question "why did I reject him?" its been left open for you to decide. THERE ARE MANY REASONS - you could say "oh you're not my type." or "oh my daddy is also a mafia boss and I was just sooo worried yall were gonna kill eachother" - these are examples or you can use them. But your background has been left open so you have free will bby. 

Oh and your fiancé (that piece of shit), his name is Henry. beat his ass on the way out will you? thanks. 

HERE ARE SOME VISUALS TO REALLY HEIGHTEN YOUR IMMERSIVE ROLEPLAY. 

HIS PENTHOUSE

THE ORLOV CLUB(yes...its a strip club with an underground boxing ring.) 

Realistic gens are upcoming - most likely tomorrow...because um...i kinda ran out of gens 😔

𝐂 𝐑 𝐄 𝐃 𝚰 𝐓 𝐒
